concerns.text: No explicit power analysis or effect size threshold documentation for correlation analysis. With 9988 knots, power should be adequate, but this should be documented per Constitution Principle VII (Statistical Significance Thresholds).
Model selection criteria not clearly specified beyond R², AIC/BIC, MAE. Should document how best model is selected (e.g., AIC/BIC preference, cross-validation) to enable reproducibility.

Research question uses 'predict' language without explicitly acknowledging Phase 1 scope limitation to crossing number ≤10. Should clarify that conclusions are limited to validated ≤10 data per SC-001.

Composite score theoretical limitation acknowledged but could be more prominent in research question framing. The exploratory nature of the composite construct should be foregrounded when discussing validation results.
Hyperbolic volume selection bias (torus/satellite knots excluded) should be explicitly acknowledged in research question framing as a limitation, not just in FR-014/SC-014.
